action.reasoning: Starting the experiment. First, I need to explore the data structure to understand the input format and prepare the basic files needed for training. I'll check the data directory structure and examine the meta.json and vocab.txt files.
action.command: ls -la /data && head -n 10 /data/meta.json && head -n 10 /data/vocab.txt && echo 'First 3 lines of labels.txt:' && head -n 3 /data/train/labels.txt
